zh.Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿炳頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ade Ela de Warenne於1147年出生在英國諾福爾可喬加時，她的父親Reginald de Warenne34歲，母親Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay17歲。她於1160年12月25日與Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿炳頓享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England: 英国英格兰奧可福爾阿炳頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ade Ela de Warenne于1147年出生在英国諾福爾可喬加时，她的父亲Reginald de Warenne34岁，母亲Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay17岁。她于1160年12月25日与Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿炳頓享年77岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently an altered form of Hilda , not in use before the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ade Ela de Warenne was born in 1147, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, her father, Reginald de Warenne, was 34 and her mother, Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, was 17. She married Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife on 25 December 1160, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1224, in Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ade Ela de Warenne est née en 1147, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Reginald de Warenne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife le 25 décembre 1160, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1224, à Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ade Ela de Warenne 1147 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Warenne 34 und ihre Mutter Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay 17. Sie hat am 25. Dezember 1160 in Schottland, United Kingdom Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ade Ela de Warenne è nata il nel 1147 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Reginald de Warenne, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife il 25 dicembre 1160, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1224, nel Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Ade Ela de Warenneが1147年にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父Reginald de Warenneは34歳，母Adeliza Alicia de Wormegayは17歳であった。1160年12月25日にイギリススコットランドでDuncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fifeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアビングドンで77歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ade Ela de Warenne(이)가 1147년 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Warenne(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1160년 12월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 압잉던에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

mn.Abingdon, Oxfordshire, England: Abingdon, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ade Ela de Warenne nasceu em 1147, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald de Warenne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife em 25 de dezembro de 1160, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1224, em Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ade Ela de Warenne родилась в 1147 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald de Warenne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife 25 декабря 1160 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1224 г. в местности абингдон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ade Ela de Warenne nació en 1147, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald de Warenne, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adeliza Alicia de Wormegay, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife el 25 de diciembre de 1160, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1224, en Abingdon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.
